CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
